name: Praline Ice Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Golden or light brown sugar (packed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugars, buttermilk, butter, syrup, and baking soda in a heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract and chopped pecans.
5. Allow the sauce to cool completely before serving. The sauce will thicken as it cools.
